name: tower_defense
description_pt: Template de tower defense com grid de construcao. Jogador posiciona torres para defender o caminho dos inimigos. Suporta multiplos tipos de torre, upgrade in-game e ondas.
description_en: Tower defense template with build grid. Player places towers to defend the enemy path. Supports multiple tower types, in-game upgrades and waves.
core_loop: Planejar → Construir torre → Iniciar onda → Inimigos percorrem caminho → Torres atiram → Coletar ouro → Upgrade/Construir → Proxima onda

scene_structure.game: Grid + Caminho + HUD (ouro, vidas, onda) + Painel de torres
